description: Braintree Hosted Fields — custom-styled card inputs in iframes for full design control, PCI compliant

client_sdk.note: Replace 3.x.x with latest version from Braintree docs

initialization.step_1: Create Braintree client: braintree.client.create({ authorization: clientToken })
initialization.step_2: Create Hosted Fields: braintree.hostedFields.create({ client, fields, styles })

styling.description: Style hosted fields using CSS-like properties passed to the styles object

events.validityChange: Fired when a field's validity changes
events.cardTypeChange: Fired when card brand is detected (Visa, MC, etc.)

tokenization.returns: Payment method nonce — send to server for Transaction.sale()

options.cardholderName: Optional — pass cardholder name if not in hosted field
options.billingAddress: Optional — street, city, region, postalCode, countryCodeAlpha2

pci_compliance.description: Hosted Fields run in iframes on Braintree's domain — raw card data never touches your page
pci_compliance.level: SAQ A eligible — lowest PCI burden

best_practices: Style fields to match your site design for trust
Listen to cardTypeChange to show card brand icon
Validate all fields before allowing tokenize
Use the validityChange event for real-time error messages
Always generate fresh client tokens per session
